chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-1654 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 23.12.2025 Mr. Abdul Raheem Ansari, Advocate for petitioner. Ms Rizwana Memon, Advocate for respondent No.1 to 5. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- DAG challenged the jurisdiction of this court on the ground that business of petitioner is not within the jurisdiction of this Court, but same is fall within the jurisdiction of Circuit Court at Larkana. After such objections, counsel for petitioner does not press the instant petition. Under instructions, instant petition is hereby dismissed, as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
